summary: CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED: Adjacent tile highlighting on Map Screen is now working correctly. The CSS class logic fix allows tiles to have both 'map-tile-unexplored' AND 'map-tile-adjacent' classes simultaneously, with golden borders (#f5d742) visible on adjacent tiles. Combat is now fully accessible - clicking adjacent tiles triggers encounters. Full game flow tested: character creation, map navigation, town shop, inventory, skills, and turn-based combat.
passed_tests: CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED: Adjacent tile highlighting working - 3 tiles with .map-tile-adjacent class visible around player position (3,6)
Adjacent tiles (2,6), (4,6), (3,5) all have correct classes: 'map-tile map-tile-unexplored map-tile-adjacent'
Golden borders with glow effect visible on adjacent tiles
Clicking adjacent tiles triggers encounters (Town, Combat)
Title screen loads with WASTELAND ZERO title and START GAME button
Character creation flow: Name input, Race selection (5 races), Class selection (6 classes), Trait selection (10+ traits)
Map screen displays 7x7 grid with player at position (3,6)
Town shop accessible with items for sale (weapons, armor, consumables)
Inventory screen shows equipped slots and bag (0/30)
Skills screen shows Combat, Defense, and Healing skill trees
Combat system fully functional with turn-based mechanics
Combat features: ATTACK (2 AP), BRACE (1 AP), V.A.T.S. (3 AP), END TURN
Combat log displays damage dealt/received, misses, round transitions
Multiple enemy encounters working (2 Raider Gunners)
HP/AP bars update correctly during combat
Navigation buttons (BAG, SKILLS, SAVE) working with data-testid attributes
Web Audio API engine implemented with playButtonClick(), playAttack(), playVictory() methods
context_for_next_testing_agent: Adjacent tile highlighting fix verified working. Combat system accessible. Full game flow tested. Web Audio API implemented but requires user interaction to initialize (browser autoplay policy). Reality Rift encounters not tested in this iteration - would require exploring more tiles to find a Rift tile type.

verified_fix_details.issue: Adjacent tiles not visible on Map Screen (iteration 3 reported 0 adjacent tiles)
verified_fix_details.fix_applied: CSS class logic in MapScreen.jsx now allows both 'map-tile-unexplored' AND 'map-tile-adjacent' classes simultaneously
verified_fix_details.verification: 3 adjacent tiles now visible with golden borders (#f5d742), glow effects, and '?' markers
verified_fix_details.css_specificity: .map-tile-adjacent uses !important overrides to ensure golden border takes precedence over unexplored styling
